description_long: This object is a rectangular electronic device with a flat, metallic gray top and a black front panel. The front panel features several logos and labels, including a prominent 'HDMI' logo, suggesting it is a media player or similar AV equipment. The device has a sleek, low-profile design with no visible buttons or controls on the top or sides, and the front face appears to have a disc slot or display area. The sides and back are plain, with no visible ports or features in these views. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal and plastic, typical of consumer electronics. This type of device is commonly found in home entertainment setups, offices, or public urban spaces where media playback is required.
description: A sleek, rectangular electronic device with a metallic gray top and a black front panel featuring HDMI branding, likely a media player or AV component.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black panel with HDMI branding and various labels, possibly a disc slot or display area.
description_view_1: Side view showing a plain, solid black edge with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear or top-down view showing a flat, featureless metallic surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a plain black edge and no visible features.
